title: Generate Test Cases with Requirement Description at Exact Maximum Allowed Length
description: Verifies that the system accepts a requirement description that is exactly at the maximum allowed character limit (500 characters) and successfully generates test cases without truncation or error.
expected_result: The system accepts the 500-character input without truncation. Test cases are successfully generated and displayed. No validation error or character-limit warning is shown.

test_steps.action: Navigate to the test case generation page
test_steps.expected: The test case generation page loads successfully

test_steps.action: Fill the requirement description with exactly 500 characters
test_steps.expected: All 500 characters are entered and displayed in the field

test_steps.action: Click the Generate Test Cases button
test_steps.expected: The system accepts the input and begins generating test cases

test_steps.action: Wait for the generation result to appear
test_steps.expected: Generated test cases are displayed on the page without any error
